# /review

> Spec-only gate per [ADR-0001](../../../design/adr/0001-review-scope-spec-only.md). FDD/TDD/blueprint/test-plan run inline self-check; `/review` is the only review-style command that flips a workflow gate.

## Usage

```
/review [--approve] [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>]
```

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/spec.md` (doc_lint clean)
- [templates/checklists/spec-review.checklist.md](../../templates/checklists/spec-review.checklist.md)
- `.workflow.json` (state `SPEC_DRAFT` for `--approve`)

## Execution flow

1. Run `doc_lint` on spec.md; any BLOCKER aborts.
2. Evaluate each checklist category (BLOCKER / REQUIRED / WARNING / OK).
3. Write `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/reviews/spec-review.md` with findings table.
4. Update `.workflow.json currentStates += SPEC_REVIEWED`.
5. On `--approve`: zero BLOCKERs + all REQUIREDs accepted → flip `gates.SPEC_APPROVED.status=APPROVED`; parallel `/fdd /test-plan /plan` become eligible.

## F&O-specific spec checks

Per [constitution/06-documentation-and-change.md](../../constitution/06-documentation-and-change.md):
- ★ mandatory sections filled
- "Not Applicable" used explicitly when applicable; no blank sections
- Object-id prefixes used consistently (EXT-NN, BDC-NN, OPR-NN, INT-NN, DEN-NN, SEC-NN, WFL-NN)
- §1.5 Open Items roll-up populated from `<TBD>` markers

## Output

- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/reviews/spec-review.md`
- `.workflow.json` updated
